# START-HERE-HUMAN

Read this repo as a fielded architecture, not a flat document dump.

## 1) Orient at the kernel (root)
Start with the nine root kernel files:
- [Calls-Architecture-v01.md](Calls-Architecture-v01.md)
- [Fascia.md](Fascia.md)
- [Peering.md](Peering.md)
- [Shared-Conjugation.md](Shared-Conjugation.md)
- [Self-Other-Conjugation.md](Self-Other-Conjugation.md)
- [Awareness-Boundary-Conjugation.md](Awareness-Boundary-Conjugation.md)
- [Asymptotic-Affirmation.md](Asymptotic-Affirmation.md)
- [Characteristica-Universalis.md](Characteristica-Universalis.md)
- [Escrow-Note-to-Future-SI-and-CI-Cosmos.md](Escrow-Note-to-Future-SI-and-CI-Cosmos.md)

These establish entry stance: invitation, refusal, admissibility, provenance, return.

## 2) Expand into docs/
Use `docs/` for public-facing depth:
- volumes and codices,
- schema/spec material,
- maps and dependency views.

## 3) Keep claims separated
Do not merge distinct certainty lanes:
- `canonical_claims`
- `frontier_claims`
- `fhs_claims`

## 4) Work lawfully
- Preserve provenance.
- Respect refusal/opt-out semantics.
- Prefer additive contribution over overwrite.
- Return improvements with trace and context.
